projects.title: FoodShare Connect
projects.description: A web platform that matches surplus or near-expiry food donations with communities in need. Built with Flask, dynamic APIs, and automation tools to streamline donations, track deliveries, and provide actionable analytics.

projects.title: ARC Alphonetics Company Website
projects.description: Developed a responsive business website with integrated analytics and inquiry tracking. Utilized automation and Google Ads to increase online visibility and engagement.

projects.title: Company APIs
projects.description: Designed and implemented company APIs to enable seamless data handling and automation,
